comments.author: @D1ckDoland
comments.text: Fake News. Bait-and-switch title to promote tourism in Pakistan. The video doesn't talk about the filthy neighborhoods and the dirty people, even though they are clearly visible in the video. Not to mention where the next terrorist bombing will come from. Most developed countries have travel advisories. The Pakistan tourism slogan should be “Come to Pakistan and catch the disease of your choice.”
